news.title: ASX soars in $80 billion rally as investors cheer ceasefire
news.snippet: Markets around the region rose sharply on Wednesday and the Australian dollar strengthened above US70¢, as investors welcomed the prospect of lower oil prices.

news.title: Not all exporters will get a tariff refund from the US. Here’s why
news.snippet: A bunch of Australian businesses have taken to the courts to claw back recently voided tariff payments made to the US government, but there may be a simpler way to apply for a refund within weeks.

news.title: Euphoric investors are savouring yet another Trump TACO moment
news.snippet: The US-Iran ceasefire has sparked the mother of all relief rallies on global markets, even though the full economic cost of the war remains unknown.

news.title: Zenith targets high-grade WA gold uplift with new drilling blitz
news.snippet: Zenith Minerals fires up the rig at Split Rocks in WA, chasing high-grade gold extensions and resource growth across a massive 19km mineralised corridor.

news.title: Macarthur lands mining heavyweight to cornerstone WA iron ore dreams
news.snippet: Macarthur Minerals has welcomed mining services heavyweight Steve Wyatt as a new cornerstone investor, following a $1.25M placement to advance its WA iron ore assets.

news.title: Super move which could cost Aussies $57,000
news.snippet: Panicked super fund members are making a move which potentially costs them tens of thousands in retirement savings.

news.title: Advance clocks monster 33Moz maiden silver resource in Mexico
news.snippet: Advance Metals has defined a 33Moz silver-equivalent maiden resource at its Yoquivo project, confirming the Mexican asset’s large-scale, bulk-mining potential.

news.title: Osmond targets first rare earths production in EU
news.snippet: Osmond is progressing a low-capex scoping study for its Spanish Orión project, targeting the European Union’s first extraction of rare earths and titanium minerals.

news.title: ATO unveils app to combat scam calls
news.snippet: The Australian Taxation Office has unleashed a new app feature to help Aussies spot and outsmart scammers targeting their money and personal information.

news.title: Warning amid ‘insane’ public transport behaviour
news.snippet: Aussies have been told to use public transport as much as possible, now fed-up commuters have revealed the “absolute chaos” that has ensued.

news.title: The three reasons behind Penrith's unstoppable start to 2026
SA premier wants 'certainty' beyond a one-year Gather Round deal
